title: Color Cone
body:
[![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1321365/description_19767e94-ef82-4569-92c6-b1e8b60e6e07.png)](https://discord.gg/XgH4EpyPD2)

**Color Cone** is a real-time color vision simulation shader designed to accurately reproduce how different types of color perception and color blindness affect visual output.

---

### 👁️ Supported Vision Modes

The shader includes simulation for:

* **Normal Vision**
* **Deuteranopia (No Green Cone)**
* **Protanopia (No Red Cone)**
* **Tritanopia (No Blue Cone)**
* **Deuteranomaly (Weak Green Cone)**
* **Protanomaly (Weak Red Cone)**
* **Tritanomaly (Weak Blue Cone)**
* **Achromatopsia (No Cone Cells)**
* **Blue Cone Monochromacy**

Each mode transforms the rendered image to reflect the perceptual characteristics of the selected vision type.

---

# Red Green Blue - Test

## Deuteranopia (No Green Cone)
![Deuteranopia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5910ebd79f3e79bdd1e5233f4a2764115e252332.png)

## Protanopia (No Red Cone)
![Protanopia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02369371aa995f95c45e9e1038765addcdeb853e.png)

## Tritanopia (No Blue Cone)
![Tritanopia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79190e2a763d3ce9892450e251de358b4b775be7.png)

## Achromatopsia (No Cone Cells)
![Achromatopsia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcfb0633549e7eb95b1c5a0544195a3bb5500ac0_0.webp)

---

### ⚙️ How It Works

* Applies cone response transformation matrices
* Adjusts RGB channel sensitivity per vision profile
* Simulates full dichromacy, anomalous trichromacy, and monochromacy
* Runs efficiently in real time

---

### 🎯 Use Cases

* Accessibility testing
* Inclusive game & UI design
* Educational visualization
* Visual research & experimentation

---

### 🚀 Key Features

* Single shader, multiple vision profiles
* Fast and lightweight implementation
* Easy integration into rendering pipelines
* Accurate perceptual approximation

Color Cone helps developers, designers, and researchers better understand how visuals are perceived across different types of color vision.
